tcp    LISTEN     0       100     127.0.0.1:631           0.0.0.0:*              users:(("cupsd",pid=432,fd=7))

udp    UNCONN     0       0       192.168.1.100:51234     8.8.8.8:53             users:(("systemd-resolve",pid=210,fd=18))
